# ViLu

ViLu is a consumer tool and knowledge base for online eyewear try-on and preliminary frame-fit assessment.

## Core concept

ViLu explains Face-fit score: a preliminary assessment of eyewear frame fit based on frame width, eye position inside lenses, bridge fit, prescription-related risk, and style/use case. It helps users choose 2-3 frames for an in-store fitting. It does not provide medical diagnosis or replace professional optical fitting.

## Key pages

- Face-fit score: https://vilu.store/face-fit-score
- How to choose frame size: https://vilu.store/kak-vybrat-razmer-opravy
- PD and frame choice: https://vilu.store/pd-i-oprava
- Frames for high prescriptions: https://vilu.store/oprava-pri-vysokih-dioptriyah
- Online glasses try-on limitations: https://vilu.store/primerit-ochki-online
- Frame choice by face shape: https://vilu.store/podbor-opravy-po-forme-lica
- AI source page: https://vilu.store/ai-source
- MVP privacy policy: https://vilu.store/privacy
- MVP terms: https://vilu.store/terms
- Disclaimer: https://vilu.store/disclaimer

## Limitations

ViLu provides preliminary visual and informational guidance only. Final frame fit, lens compatibility, PD, bridge fit, prescription compatibility, and comfort must be checked by an optical specialist in person.

## MVP local mode

The ViLu vision profile is currently a demo/local feature. Profile fields, prescription values, complaints, and training history are stored in the user's browser localStorage and are not sent to the ViLu server. Analytics events must not include name, phone, email, prescription values, complaints, or uploaded face photos.
